configurations.description: List of paths to JMX metric definition YAML files.
configurations.name: otel.jmx.config

configurations.description: Time in milliseconds between JMX MBean detection attempts.
configurations.name: otel.jmx.discovery.delay

configurations.description: List of predefined JMX target systems to collect metrics for.
configurations.name: otel.jmx.target.system

description: Collects and reports metrics exposed through Java Management Extensions (JMX). It can be configured to extract JVM and application-level telemetry data from JMX MBeans such as memory usage, thread counts, and garbage collection statistics, and translate these measurements into OpenTelemetry metrics.
name: jmx-metrics
